samples.sample_name: New Hampshire Department of Education Bureau of Special Education

query_basis: Bounded probes to official New Hampshire Department of Education district-profile and school-directory paths now preserve the exact transport blocker instead of weak fallback district rows.
blocker_evidence: Bounded probes to `https://www.education.nh.gov/`, `/school-and-district-profiles`, and `/find-school-or-district` returned HTTP 403, so no reviewed district- or county-grade education routing chain is preserved on disk.

query_basis: Reviewed the packet's exact VR root plus likely official Bureau of Vocational Rehabilitation paths to preserve the real transport and stale-root blockers.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party DRC-NH history and funding pages explicitly preserve New Hampshire P&A designation and core Protection and Advocacy program funding.

samples.evidence_snippet: Designated by Governor Meldrim Thomson, Jr. as New Hampshire's Protection and Advocacy agency.
Protection and Advocacy for Individuals with Developmental Disabilities (PADD) Program ... DRC-NH receives PADD funds to serve adults and children with developmental disabilities.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party PICNH evidence on disk explicitly preserves New Hampshire parent-information-center identity, special-education help, direct contact routing, and Department of Education support.

samples.evidence_snippet: Parent Information Center of NH supports families of children with disabilities and special health care needs, offers special-education help by email or phone, and the Parent Information Center on Special Education is funded in part or whole by the U.S. Department of Education.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party NH Legal Assistance and 603 Legal Aid pages explicitly preserve statewide free civil legal aid plus centralized statewide intake for New Hampshire residents.

samples.evidence_snippet: New Hampshire Legal Assistance (NHLA) provides free civil legal aid to people in New Hampshire ... To apply for civil legal aid, connect with 603 Legal Aid online or by phone.

samples.sample_name: 603 Legal Aid Apply For Legal Aid
samples.evidence_snippet: 603 Legal Aid gives free legal services to people who qualify ... Apply by phone: (603) 224-3333.
